# cortex_teams (Data Source)

Teams data source - returns a list of all teams



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal identifier for this data source
- `teams` (Attributes List) List of all teams (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the team
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the team is archived
- `members` (Attributes List) List of team members (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams--members))
- `name` (String) Name of the team
- `slack_channels` (Attributes List) List of Slack channels associated with the team (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams--slack_channels))
- `tag` (String) Tag of the team

<a id="nestedatt--teams--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams.members`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--teams--slack_channels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams.slack_channels`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `notifications_enabled` (Boolean)
